label: Pipeline Summary
description: Total instructions, filled, partially filled, pending counts, and average slippage across the pipeline.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets.

0.4.note: No any types or @ts-ignore in widget file.

0.5.note: No lib/mocks imports in widget file; data comes via useInstructionsData().

0.6.note: Data context uses synchronous MOCK_STRATEGY_INSTRUCTIONS; no async fetch; no isLoading state reachable. Must add isLoading to context when real API lands.

0.7.note: KpiStrip renders zeros (total=0, filled=0, etc.) when filteredInstructions is empty; valid KPI-strip empty state.

0.8.note: Data context is synchronous; no error state possible. Must add error to context when real API lands.

l0.notes: All checks pass or N/A (mock-pending). See knownIssues for loading/error wiring deferred to API integration.

1.1.note: Data sourced exclusively from useInstructionsData() hook; no inline fetch or direct import.

1.2.note: Context calls useGlobalScope() and derives scopeStrategyIds via getStrategyIdsForScope().

1.3.note: organizationIds in scope drives scopeStrategyIds which filters allInstructions.

1.4.note: clientIds in scope drives scopeStrategyIds cascade via getStrategyIdsForScope().

1.5.note: strategyIds in scope drives scopeStrategyIds filter directly.

1.6.note: When scopeStrategyIds.length === 0 the filter is skipped so all instructions are returned.

1.7.note: Token/venue/config constants in lib/config/services/instructions.config and lib/config/services/trading.config (not lib/mocks).

l1.notes: All 7 checks pass. Context properly scoped via useGlobalScope() + getStrategyIdsForScope().

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live=yes (KPI reflects live pipeline), paper=yes (context tags instructions with '(Simulated)'), batch=yes (context filters to FILLED only). All 3 modes applicable.

3.2.note: instructions-data-context.tsx:46 reads {isPaper, isBatch, mode} from useExecutionMode(). filteredInstructions memo at line 63 branches on isBatch (filter to FILLED) and isPaper (tag strategyType with '(Simulated)').

3.3.note: KPI summary widget has no order/trade submission buttons; check not applicable.

3.4.note: Human check: batch mode visual indicator visible in widget/layout. Agent cannot verify visually.

3.5.note: Paper mode: context maps instructions to tagged strategyType '(Simulated)'; KPI strip reflects counts of simulated instructions. Behavior is defined and wired.

3.6.note: No WebSocket connections or setInterval in data context or widget file. Refresh is a no-op stub (line 138) pending real API.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1/3.2/3.5/3.6 pass. 3.3 N/A (no order entry in KPI strip). 3.4 deferred to human walkthrough.

4.1.note: No onClick handlers in instr-summary widget file; widget is purely display. No dead buttons.

4.2.note: No href links in widget file.

4.3.note: Human check: verify all pipeline KPI metrics are present and useful for the user's purpose.

4.4.note: Human check: KPI values update when filters change.

4.5.note: No links to gated pages in this widget.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks performed in widget render. Entitlement is handled at the widget-wrapper/registry level.

4.7.note: No tabs or collapsible sections in KPI strip.

4.8.note: Human check: KPI strip scrolls horizontally within widget bounds on narrow layouts.

l4.notes: Agent checks 4.1/4.2/4.5/4.6 pass. 4.3/4.4/4.8 deferred to human walkthrough. 4.7 N/A.

5.1.note: Target strategies: this widget is a domain-wide summary strip — serves all strategy types registered in INSTRUCTION_STRATEGY_TYPES (BASIS_TRADE, RECURSIVE_STAKED_BASIS, AMM_LP, LENDING_ARB, FLASH_LOAN, STAKING, SPORTS_ARB, CEFI_MM, OPTIONS_MM). Cross-references lib/strategy-registry.ts strategy IDs: DEFI_ETH_BASIS_HUF_1H, DEFI_ETH_REC_STAKE_HUF_1H, DEFI_UNI_LP_HUF_1H, CEFI_BTC_MM_EVT_TICK, CEFI_ETH_OPT_MM_EVT_TICK, SPORTS_NFL_ARB_SCE_GAME, PRED_POLY_ARB_SCE_1M, PRED_BTC_CEFI_ARB_SCE_5M, CEFI_BTC_BASIS_SCE_1H.

5.2.note: Human check: KPI strip shows all expected metrics for each strategy type.

5.3.note: Human check: execution flow updates (fill/pending counts change after instruction submitted).

5.4.note: Human check: zero-fill edge case (empty pipeline shows zeros, not errors).

5.5.note: Human check: cross-widget — after submitting order in terminal, instruction appears in this KPI strip.

5.6.note: Human check: KPI strip reflects instructions across defi/cefi/tradfi/sports/predictions.

l5.notes: 5.1 documented from strategy registry. All other checks deferred to human walkthrough.

l6.notes: Deferred to L6 pass after L5 human sign-off.

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex/rgb/hsl colors in instructions-summary-widget.tsx.

7.2.note: No lib/mocks imports in widget file. Data sourced via context hook.

7.3.note: File is 33 lines — well within 500-line limit. No function exceeds 200 lines.

7.4.note: Component PascalCase (InstructionsSummaryWidget), file kebab-case (instructions-summary-widget.tsx), hook useCamelCase (useInstructionsData).

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.6.note: No dangerouslySetInnerHTML, eval, new Function, or innerHTML= in widget file.

7.7.note: No useEffect/useMemo/useCallback in widget file. All memoization is in the data context.

l7.notes: All mechanically-fixable L7 checks pass. 7.5 globally deferred until i18n ships.

8.1.note: No text-[...] or fontSize arbitrary values in instructions-summary-widget.tsx.

8.2.note: No p/m-[...] or gap-[...] arbitrary spacing values in widget file.

8.3.note: Widget delegates to KpiSummaryWidget shared primitive. No custom div+tailwind reimplementation.

8.4.note: No img elements, no input elements, no interactive divs without role. Widget is purely display; KpiSummaryWidget handles a11y internally. Human keyboard pass deferred to L8 human walkthrough.

8.5.note: Human check: KPI strip renders correctly at minW=4/minH=1 and at 1280/1920 viewports.

l8.notes: Agent-fixable checks 8.1-8.3 clean. 8.4 agent-grep clean (no violations found); human keyboard pass deferred. 8.5 deferred to human walkthrough.

keepSeparate.rationale: KPI strip is a distinct widget class (dense header row) separate from the pipeline table and detail panel. It aggregates domain-wide counts and must remain independently placeable.

relationships.notes: Reads from InstructionsDataContext which is also consumed by instr-pipeline-table and instr-detail-panel. All three are peers sharing the same context scope.

dataContract.notes: Currently uses synchronous MOCK_STRATEGY_INSTRUCTIONS. Refresh is a no-op stub. When real API lands, context must add isLoading+error and a REST/poll mechanism.

gaps: No real API wired; mock data covers limited strategy types
isLoading and error states not reachable with current mock context
coverage.notes: Widget is venue-agnostic and strategy-agnostic at the display level — it aggregates whatever instructions are in the filtered context. Coverage depends on context data completeness.

knownIssues: context does not expose isLoading or error; KpiSummaryWidget has no loading/error props — both must be added when real API replaces mock data
refresh() is a no-op stub in instructions-data-context.tsx:138 — must be wired to API call when backend is ready

findings.description: instructions-summary-widget.tsx — ~5 user-visible KPI label strings (Total, Filled, Partial, Pending, Avg slippage). No fix required until i18n ships.
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21
